queries.question: For each education program, list the audience being targeted.
queries.sql: select education_program.name , target_audiences.audience_name from Education_Program_Target_Audiences join Target_Audiences on Education_Program_Target_Audiences.target_audience_id = Target_Audiences.id join Education_Program on Education_Program_Target_Audiences.education_program_id = Education_Program.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?audience_name WHERE {
  ?education_program_target_audiences a :Education_Program_Target_Audiences .
  ?target_audiences a :Target_Audiences .
  ?education_program_target_audiences p:hasTarget_Audiences ?target_audiences .
  ?education_program a :Education_Program .
  ?education_program_target_audiences p:hasEducation_Program ?education_program .
  ?education_program p:name ?name .
  ?target_audiences p:name ?audience_name .
}

queries.question: Show me the audience each education program is targeting.
queries.sql: SELECT Target_Audiences.audience_name  from Education_Program_Target_Audiences join Target_Audiences on Education_Program_Target_Audiences.target_audience_id = Target_Audiences.id join Education_Program on Education_Program_Target_Audiences.education_program_id = Education_Program.id   GROUP BY Education_Program_Target_Audiences.target_audience_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Education_Program_Target_Audiences.education_program_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Education_Program)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the audience each education program is targeting.
